mapper.delete: DELETE FROM forum_collect WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_comment SET status = 0, content = '该评论已删除', updated_time = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reply_count_cache (comment_id, reply_count) VALUES ( #{commentId}, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_comment WHERE parent_id = #{commentId} AND status = 1) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reply_count = VALUES(reply_count)
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post p JOIN forum_section s ON p.section_id = s.section_id SET p.section_name = s.section_name
mapper.select: SELECT section_id, section_name, section_desc, sort_order, status, created_by, created_time, updated_time FROM forum_section ORDER BY sort_order ASC, section_id ASC

SELECT p.post_id, p.section_id, p.title, p.content, p.user_id, p.is_top, p.is_essence, p.status, p.collect_count, p.comment_count, p.created_time, p.updated_time, p.last_comment_time, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, u.username AS username FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN p.is_top = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, p.created_time DESC -- 再按创建时间倒序

SELECT fp.post_id, fp.section_id, fp.title, fp.content, fp.user_id, fp.is_top, fp.is_essence, fp.status, fp.comment_count, fp.collect_count, fp.created_time, fp.updated_time, fp.last_comment_time FROM forum_post fp INNER JOIN forum_collect fc ON fp.post_id = fc.post_id WHERE fc.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT fp.post_id, fp.section_id, fp.title, fp.content, fp.user_id, fp.is_top, fp.is_essence, fp.status, fp.collect_count, IFNULL(fc.comment_count, 0) AS comment_count, fp.created_time, fp.updated_time, fp.last_comment_time FROM forum_post fp LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM forum_comment GROUP BY post_id ) fc ON fp.post_id = fc.post_id ORDER BY IFNULL(fc.comment_count, 0) DESC, fp.created_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post fp LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS collect_count FROM forum_collect GROUP BY post_id ) fc ON fp.post_id = fc.post_id SET fp.collect_count = IFNULL(fc.collect_count, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT fp.post_id, fp.section_id, fp.title, fp.content, fp.user_id, fp.is_top, fp.is_essence, fp.status, fp.collect_count, IFNULL(fc.comment_count, 0) AS comment_count, fp.created_time, fp.updated_time, fp.last_comment_time FROM forum_post fp LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM forum_comment GROUP BY post_id ) fc ON fp.post_id = fc.post_id ORDER BY fp.collect_count DESC, fp.created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post (title, content, section_id, user_id, created_time,nickname) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{sectionId}, #{userId}, NOW(),#{nickname})

INSERT INTO forum_attachment (post_id, file_path, user_id) VALUES
(#{item.postId}, #{item.url}, #{item.userId})
mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id, p.section_id, p.title, p.content, p.user_id, p.is_top, p.is_essence, p.status, p.collect_count, p.comment_count, p.created_time, p.updated_time, p.last_comment_time, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.username AS user_username, a.attachment_id, a.file_path FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN forum_attachment a ON p.post_id = a.post_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY a.attachment_id ASC

SELECT c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.content, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.status, c.like_count, c.created_time, c.updated_time, u.nickname AS comment_nickname, u.avatar_url AS comment_avatar_url, u.username AS comment_username FROM forum_comment c LEFT JOIN `user` u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND (c.status = 1 OR c.status = 0) AND (c.parent_id IS NULL OR c.parent_id = 0) ORDER BY c.created_time DESC

SELECT c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.content, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.status, c.like_count, c.created_time, c.updated_time, u.nickname AS comment_nickname, u.avatar_url AS comment_avatar_url, u.username AS comment_username FROM forum_comment c LEFT JOIN `user` u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.parent_id = #{commentId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_time ASC
SELECT attachment_id, comment_id, file_path, file_path AS url, user_id FROM forum_attachment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} ORDER BY attachment_id ASC

SELECT p.post_id, p.section_id, p.title, p.content, p.user_id, p.is_top, p.is_essence, p.status, p.collect_count, p.comment_count, p.created_time, p.updated_time, p.last_comment_time, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, u.username AS username FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id
AND p.title LIKE concat('%', #{title}, '%')
ORDER BY p.created_time DESC

SELECT p.post_id, p.section_id, p.title, p.content, p.user_id, p.is_top, p.is_essence, p.status, p.collect_count, p.comment_count, p.created_time, p.updated_time, p.last_comment_time, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, u.username AS username FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.created_time DESC

SELECT fc.comment_id, fc.post_id, fc.content, fc.user_id, fc.created_time, fp.title AS post_title, fp.content AS post_content, fp.created_time AS post_created_time, u.avatar_url FROM forum_comment fc JOIN forum_post fp ON fc.post_id = fp.post_id LEFT JOIN user u ON fc.user_id = u.user_id WHERE fc.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT fc.comment_id, fc.post_id, fc.content, fc.user_id, fc.created_time, fp.title AS post_title, fp.content AS post_content, fp.created_time AS post_created_time, u.avatar_url FROM forum_comment fc JOIN forum_post fp ON fc.post_id = fp.post_id LEFT JOIN user u ON fc.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `forum_comment` (post_id,content,user_id,parent_id, status, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{postId}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO forum_attachment (comment_id, file_path, user_id) VALUES
(#{item.commentId}, #{item.url}, #{item.userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_comment SET like_count = like_count + #{delta} WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
